catalog_script_client.name: Toggle Attachments based on MRVS

sys_update_version.name: catalog_script_client_cabfce4cc3ecc350f324fa0ed40131b2
sys_update_version.payload:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update sys_domain="global" table="catalog_script_client"><catalog_script_client action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE"><active>true</active><applies_catalog>true</applies_catalog><applies_extended>false</applies_extended><applies_req_item>false</applies_req_item><applies_sc_task>false</applies_sc_task><applies_target_record>false</applies_target_record><applies_to>set</applies_to><cat_item/><cat_variable/><condition/><description/><field/><global>true</global><isolate_script>true</isolate_script><messages/><name>Toggle Attachments based on MRVS</name><order/><published_ref/><script><![CDATA[function onChange(control, oldValue, newValue, isLoading) {
    // Hide attachments on load or if the MRVS is empty
    if (isLoading || newValue == '') {
        g_form.setDisplay('matriculation_o_level_certificate', false); 
        g_form.setDisplay('intermediate_a_level_certificate', false);
		g_form.setDisplay('degree_transcript', false);
        return;
    }

    // The newValue of an MRVS is a JSON string. Parse it into an array of objects.
    var mrvsData = JSON.parse(newValue);
    
    var hasMatric = false;
	var hasInter = false;
    var hasBachelorsOrMasters = false;

    // Loop through the rows to check what degrees were added
    for (var i = 0; i < mrvsData.length; i++) {
        if (mrvsData[i].degree == 'Matriculation/O-Levels') {
            hasMatric = true;
        }
		if (mrvsData[i].degree == 'Intermediate/A-Levels') {
            hasInter = true;
        }
        if (mrvsData[i].degree == "Bachelor's" || mrvsData[i].degree == "Master's") {
            hasBachelorsOrMasters = true;
        }
    }

    // Show or hide the parent attachment variables based on the loop results
    if (hasMatric) {
        g_form.setDisplay('matriculation_o_level_certificate', true);
        g_form.setMandatory('matriculation_o_level_certificate', true);
    } else {
        g_form.setDisplay('matriculation_o_level_certificate', false);
        g_form.setMandatory('matriculation_o_level_certificate', false);
    }

	if (hasInter) {
        g_form.setDisplay('intermediate_a_level_certificate', true);
        g_form.setMandatory('intermediate_a_level_certificate', true);
    } else {
        g_form.setDisplay('intermediate_a_level_certificate', false);
        g_form.setMandatory('intermediate_a_level_certificate', false);
    }

    if (hasBachelorsOrMasters) {
        g_form.setDisplay('degree_transcript', true);
        g_form.setMandatory('degree_transcript', true);
    } else {
        g_form.setDisplay('degree_transcript', false);
        g_form.setMandatory('degree_transcript', false);
    }
}]]></script><sys_class_name>catalog_script_client</sys_class_name><sys_created_by>admin</sys_created_by><sys_created_on>2026-04-24 21:24:10</sys_created_on><sys_domain>global</sys_domain><sys_domain_path>/</sys_domain_path><sys_id>cabfce4cc3ecc350f324fa0ed40131b2</sys_id><sys_mod_count>0</sys_mod_count><sys_name>Toggle Attachments based on MRVS</sys_name><sys_overrides/><sys_package display_value="AUMS" source="x_595775_automat_0">ceb9dde6c35d32100a7bf3ddd4013136</sys_package><sys_policy/><sys_scope display_value="AUMS">ceb9dde6c35d32100a7bf3ddd4013136</sys_scope><sys_update_name>catalog_script_client_cabfce4cc3ecc350f324fa0ed40131b2</sys_update_name><sys_updated_by>admin</sys_updated_by><sys_updated_on>2026-04-24 21:24:10</sys_updated_on><table/><type>onChange</type><ui_type>10</ui_type><va_supported>true</va_supported><variable_set display_value="Academic Record">5bd40908c3a4c350f324fa0ed401312b</variable_set><view/></catalog_script_client></record_update>
